utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five items with detailed descriptions and costs. Each section provides the appropriate type of coverage and includes cost information (either individually or as part of the total). Therefore, every required item is present and fully specified with details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan mentions a single integrated policy: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan40' under the 'Proposed Comprehensive Portfolio'. The closest matching entries in the ground-truth dataset are the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' variants for physical health, mental health, property coverage, and travel insurance. The plan also includes an 'Adventure Travel Add-on' (€80/month), which directly corresponds to 'Adventure Travel Coverage' under 'travel_enhancement_services'. Thus, we map each of these components to their respective ratings: physical health (LifeFirst Standard Plan) = 9, mental health (LifeFirst Standard Plan) = 9, property coverage (LifeFirst Standard Coverage) = 9, travel coverage (LifeFirst Standard Plan) = 9, and adventure sports coverage (Adventure Travel Coverage) = 10.
